special_mechanics.name: Platforming Challenges
special_mechanics.description: Game features 2D platform mechanics reminiscent of Metroid and Castlevania

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Player equips and switches between multiple weapons, can be leveled up to level three

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: Only qualitative information available from Wikipedia gameplay description. No quantitative physics parameters documented in sources. Game features simple controls (movement, running, jumping, shooting) but exact values are not publicly documented.
